21307.title: Bargain Hunt : Newbury 6
21307.description: Charlie Ross is at the Newbury Showground, where experts David Harper and John Cameron assist two teams of friends at an Antiques and Collectors Fair. Charlie takes a trip down memory lane with a Mini Cooper S, before a short journey to the Auction where Thomas Plant is on the rostrum. At the end of it all will either team be driving home with any profits?
